input.title: Validate employee bridge protocol
input.body_md: Inspect the employee template and confirm the JSON bridge files are present and internally consistent. Do not modify source files except writing the required result package.

acceptance: Confirm agent.json contains schema_version, employee_id, default_model_profile, capabilities, accepts_task_types, and paths.
Confirm state/status.json uses schema_version employee-status.v1 and has state idle before starting.
Confirm .claude/commands/execute-task.md describes reading inbox/tasks/<task_id>.json and writing outbox/results/<task_id>.json.
Write outbox/results/task-0001.md with Result, Verification, and Notes sections.
Append started and completed events to logs/events.jsonl using schema_version employee-event.v1.
Include a concise verification list in outbox/results/task-0001.json.
